title: Design
description: Design APIs, product surfaces, UI behavior, and integration contracts using open standards where they fit. Use for API shape, schemas, workflows, accessibility, observability, and interface decisions.
body: Design work must produce an implementable contract, not vague advice. Pick the smallest standard that matches the surface, cite the source or current repo evidence, and define request/response, event, schema, error, auth, accessibility, telemetry, and compatibility behavior only when the surface needs it.
